name: Play jazz and check calendar (genuine composite)
description: Genuinely composite request that the decomposer fans out into two subtasks. Each subtask runs its own auction. In subtask 1 (play jazz) only DJ-agent has plausible bid reasoning; in subtask 2 (check calendar) only calendar-agent does. Reasoning is disjoint by construction so overlap penalty does not fire. Both subtasks resolve to distinct winners. This fixture verifies the overlap penalty does NOT over-suppress legitimate composites.

bids.reasoning: I play jazz music from the streaming service

expected.rationale: Dominance gap > 0.3 even before overlap; fast path picks DJ. Disjoint reasoning means overlap penalty would not fire even at the gap threshold.

bids.reasoning: I list calendar events for today and the next few days

expected.rationale: Dominance gap > 0.3; fast path picks calendar.
Composite is preserved through decomposer fan-out; each subtask resolves independently; no over-suppression.
